items.title: Final: Mercury 86, Sparks 82. Los Angeles had a shot to tie in the final 20 seconds but Dearica Hamby’s layup rolled unkindly off the rim. The Sparks have lost 5 in a row. They’re 10-16. Alyssa Thomas had 19 points, 15 assists, 11 rebounds for Phoenix. And now the All-Star break.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Mercury 86, Sparks 82. Los Angeles had a shot to tie in the final 20 seconds but Dearica Hamby’s layup rolled unkindly off the rim. The Sparks have lost 5 in a row. They’re 10-16. Alyssa Thomas had 19 points, 15 assists, 11 rebounds for Phoenix. And now the All-Star break.

items.title: When Dillon Mitchell is on the floor, his athleticism stands out.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
When Dillon Mitchell is on the floor, his athleticism stands out.

So does his defense. He was one of the best perimeter defenders in the nation.

Thanks to advice from the Celtics' coaching staff, Mitchell's already improving as a shooter. It's a testament to...1/2

items.title: End Q3 | Sparks 60, Mercury 60 | Cameron Brink ends the third with a massive block, and the Sparks, despite shooting just 37% and having 15 turnovers, are level. Dearica Hamby has 15 points and 9 rebounds. Alyssa Thomas with 19 points, 9 rebounds, 8 assists for Phoenix.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Slick Watts. Undrafted PG from Xavier LA made SEA in 73 as hustler. Led NBA w/8.1 apg & 3.2 spg in 75-76. Unique player who wore crooked headbands & shaved his dome before it was a thing. After brief peak, was out of NBA by 79 (age 27). RIP Slick.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
